title: Cobblemon Knowlogy
description: Knowlogy Book addon with wiki information about the Cobblemon mod. The Cobblepedia successor.
body:
# Cobblemon Knowlogy

![Cobblemon Category](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dba1h0rW/images/0e03bc55dae109eb3d9777de047402c51f292ee5.png)

[![Available for Fabric](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/fabric/compact-supports.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy/versions?l=fabric)
[![Available for NeoForge](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/neoforge/compact-supports.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy/versions?l=neoforge)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/dba1h0rW?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1144644?style=flat&logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-knowlogy)

This is an addon mod for [Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy) that adds [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) information to the **Book o' Knowlogy**, showing information from the [official Cobblemon Wiki](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Main_Page).

It's meant to be a successor to my previous [Cobblepedia](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblepedia) mod.

## Dependencies

[![Knowlogy Book](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/knowlogy/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy)
[![Cobblemon](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/cobblemon/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

And all their respective requirements.

## Features

### Custom Components

Better visualize Pokémon Drops, Berry Mutations and Fossil Resurrections with custom components.

![Pokémon Drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dba1h0rW/images/70f4a1c8dab2a96e3840a27c1027b3ce9cf5b937.png)

### Poképedia Resourcepack

Transform the **Book o' Knowlogy** into a **Poképedia** with item and screen textures based on the Pokédex, by using the optional resourcepack included in the mod.

![Poképedia Resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dba1h0rW/images/d30b21ef31db50d8e3e564a15befafa670659273.png)

## Help the Project
